channel.title: Pulp Fiction (CGC) on One Stop Pinball Shop
channel.description: Recent content in Pulp Fiction (CGC) on One Stop Pinball Shop

item.title: Pulp Fiction Topper - Jack Rabbit Slim's Dance
item.description: This topper is built specifically for Pulp Fiction owners who want the backbox to feel like part of the machine theme, not an unrelated add-on. The Jack Rabbit Slim’s dance scene is painted on the rear side of the glass to create visible depth when lit.
